description_long: This helmet is a stylized, ancient Greek or Roman-inspired piece, primarily constructed from a dark, metallic material with a slightly marbled texture. The helmet features a prominent crest ridge running from front to back, highlighted with gold trim that also outlines the eye and face openings, as well as the lower edge. The front of the helmet has a T-shaped opening for the face, providing visibility and breathability, while the sides curve downward to protect the cheeks. The back is rounded and smooth, offering full cranial coverage, and the gold accents add a sense of regality and craftsmanship. There are no visible ventilation holes, logos, or graphic designs, giving the helmet a clean, classic appearance. The interior is likely hollow, designed to fit over a human head, and the overall build suggests it is both protective and ornamental.
description: A dark, metallic helmet with gold trim, featuring a T-shaped face opening and a prominent crest ridge, inspired by ancient Greek or Roman designs.
description_view_0: The helmet is seen from the top, showing the rounded dome and the gold-accented crest ridge running along the center.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the pronounced gold trim outlining the face opening and the lower edge, as well as the helmet's smooth, rounded back.
description_view_2: The front view displays the T-shaped face opening, gold-edged eye and mouth areas, and the central crest ridge.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors the gold-trimmed face opening and lower edge, with the smooth, rounded back visible.
